cases.description: Feedback summary request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: show me what feedback has accumulated in .codi/feedback/
expectations: Groups by artifact name (skill or rule)
Shows the top 3 most actionable observations

cases.prompt: before I run /codi-refine-rules, show me what's accumulated

cases.description: Empty feedback dir produces clear message
expectations: Reports 'No observations yet' with guidance that observations are collected automatically

cases.description: Applying rule changes does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: apply the collected rule feedback to the rules
expectations: Does NOT only summarize — proceeds to one-at-a-time approval flow

cases.description: Emitting a new observation does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: I noticed codi-testing still references Jest but we use Vitest now
expectations: codi-rule-feedback handles the observation emission (CODI-OBSERVATION marker)
